name: VCO - Wavetable
description: This algorithm is a simple VCO which uses wavetables for its wave shapes. Please see the section above on how wavetables are formatted and arranged on the MicroSD card.
gui_description: The display shows a single cycle of the current wavetable waveform, and the VCO's pitch as a MIDI note name plus cents and as a frequency in Hz.

parameters.name: Wave offset
parameters.description: Sets the position within the wavetable.

parameters.name: Octave
parameters.description: Adjusts the VCO tuning in octaves.

parameters.name: Transpose
parameters.description: Adjusts the VCO tuning in semitones.

parameters.name: Fine tune
parameters.description: Adjusts the VCO tuning in cents.

parameters.name: Amplitude
parameters.description: Sets the amplitude of the output (before it's affected by the gain).

parameters.name: Gain
parameters.description: Sets the level of the output.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: If enabled, MIDI notes on the specified channel will set the pitch of the VCO.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Wave input
input_ports.description: Sets an input bus to modulate the wave offset.

input_ports.name: Wave input
input_ports.description: Sets an input bus to modulate the wave offset.
